patch.value: Lane F: CI/CD best-practice + secret/PII leak scan incl. pm history files

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Audit started: CI/CD workflows review + repo-wide secret/PII scan + npm pack inspection + gh settings check

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Audit complete. Secrets: CLEAN (0 real leaks; only test fixtures + audit-evidence text; public Sentry DSN intentional). npm tarball clean (1089 files, no .agents/tests/env; no /home/steve in dist or sourcemaps). Branch protection 12 required checks exactly match workflow job names. CI/CD hygiene strong (SHA-pinned, least-priv, concurrency, timeouts, caches). Nits: auto-release actions:write likely unneeded; release env has no protection rules/reviewers; secret_scanning_non_provider_patterns+validity_checks disabled; check-secrets lacks sk-/AIzaSy-adjacent OpenAI/Anthropic patterns (has AIza) — minor. Today's Windows nightly failure already tracked+closed via GH-416/PR-417.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Lane F COMPLETE. Verdict: no confirmed leaks (3673 tracked files incl. history jsonl scanned; npm tarball clean, 1089 files). CI/CD already best-practice (SHA-pinned actions, least-priv, concurrency, timeouts, shared build artifact). 4 hygiene fixes queued: auto-release actions:write->read; release environment protection rules; enable secret_scanning non-provider patterns+validity checks; add sk-/sk-ant-/glpat- rules to check-secrets-lib.

patch.value: CI/CD+secret scan complete, fixes applied: auto-release actions:write->read; release environment deployment branch policy restricted to main + v*.*.* tags (live via gh api); check-secrets-lib gained anthropic-api-key/openai-api-key/gitlab-token rules (+spec coverage, repo scan clean). secret_scanning_non_provider_patterns/validity_checks require paid GitHub Secret Protection — unavailable on free plan, PATCH silently ignored; declined by policy (free services only).
